verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family tyrosine kinase anchored to the cytoplasmic (inner) leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation/palmitoylation. Its catalytic and SH2/SH3 domains face the cytosol, where it phosphorylates ITAM/ITIM substrates downstream of BCR, FcεRI, and other immune receptors. No extracellular-facing pool exists.
